title: Do Dermal Fillers Hurt？ | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: Do Dermal Fillers Hurt？ ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: Do dermal fellas hurt well the short answer is no injections hurt but dermal fillers probably don't hurt that much more than anything else that you're injecting in fact they're also usually included lidocaine which means there's an anesthetic effect and the thing that is the bigg…

segments.text: do dermal fellas hurt well the short answer is no injections hurt but dermal fillers probably don't hurt that much more than anything else that you're injecting in fact they're also usually included lidocaine which means there's an anesthetic effect and the thing that is the biggest variable is the person you're injecting and where you're injecting so if you inject a sensitive person on their Vermilion border they will feel it basically if you don't use anesthetic cream whereas some people are fairly insensitive to injections and they can be chatting away and you can be doing any part of their face and they don't react as if there's anything significant going on so the biggest variable is the person the second biggest burial will be the place on the face that you're injecting but any injection has a degree of discomfort and the short answer is more complicated than just the product hurting it's more about the person and the place that you're injecting [Music]

transcript: do dermal fellas hurt well the short answer is no injections hurt but dermal fillers probably don't hurt that much more than anything else that you're injecting in fact they're also usually included lidocaine which means there's an anesthetic effect and the thing that is the biggest variable is the person you're injecting and where you're injecting so if you inject a sensitive person on their Vermilion border they will feel it basically if you don't use anesthetic cream whereas some people are fairly insensitive to injections and they can be chatting away and you can be doing any part of their face and they don't react as if there's anything significant going on so the biggest variable is the person the second biggest burial will be the place on the face that you're injecting but any injection has a degree of discomfort and the short answer is more complicated than just the product hurting it's more about the person and the place that you're injecting [Music]
